REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ST. CLARE LP, SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Westley, 415-362-2817 for Plainitff for Dwaine Burgardt.
Paul Whitfield, 818-841-1144 for Defendants St. Clare LP and Sojourn Properties. (courtcall)

Not argued. Both sides submitt to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ST. CLARE LP, SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with 20-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a contract (written/oral, parties, terms of legal effect, etc) and a covenant express or implied that has been breached. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Westley, 415-362-2817 for Plainitff for Dwaine Burgardt.
Paul Whitfield, 818-841-1144 for Defendants St. Clare LP and Sojourn Properties. (courtcall)

Argued. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT ST. CLARE LP, SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint is Taken Under Submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Continued To Oct-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS ST. CLARE LP AND SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT will be heard in Department 501, the real property/housing court, on October 20, 2016. In the future all further motions in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501 and the parties must provide courtesy copies of all papers filed on the motion and any pleading at issue on the motion to department 501 no later than the due date of the reply papers.
